requirements.text: The `.omp/AGENTS.md` Command Reference table includes every tracked shipped lifecycle command and the tracked `/npm-release` command exactly once.
requirements.acceptance: `git ls-files .omp/commands/*.md` returns ten tracked command files and `python3` parsing of `.omp/AGENTS.md` finds the same ten slash command names in the Command Reference table, with no missing or extra entries.

requirements.text: The `.omp/AGENTS.md` workflow narrative distinguishes the eight bead lifecycle execution loop from bootstrap and release helper commands.
requirements.acceptance: Reading lines 8-31 of `.omp/AGENTS.md` shows `/brainstorm` through `/close` as the lifecycle loop, `/init` as bootstrap, and `/npm-release` as release helper, without implying npm release is part of every bead loop.

requirements.text: The `.omp/AGENTS.md` repository tree comment and command file listing match the tracked command inventory.
requirements.acceptance: The tree block under `.omp/commands/` says ten command files and lists `npm-release.md` alongside the existing command files, matching `git ls-files .omp/commands/*.md`.

requirements.text: README and `.omp/AGENTS.md` agree on the shipped command count and names.
requirements.acceptance: A comparison script extracts slash commands from README workflow rows and `.omp/AGENTS.md` Command Reference rows and confirms both document the same ten commands.

requirements.text: No untracked `.omp/commands/*.md` file is used as evidence for the inventory.
requirements.acceptance: `git status --short .omp/commands` is empty, or any untracked command file is explicitly excluded from the verification evidence; inventory is derived from `git ls-files`, not filesystem globbing.

requirements.text: No unrelated command semantics, workflow gates, or command implementations change.
requirements.acceptance: `git diff --name-only` for `/ship` includes `.omp/AGENTS.md` and bead artifacts only unless the plan explicitly expands scope; no `.omp/commands/*.md`, `.omp/extensions/*.ts`, or README behavior changes are required for this bead.

success_criteria: `.omp/AGENTS.md` Command Reference command set equals tracked `.omp/commands/*.md` basenames.
`.omp/AGENTS.md` repository tree says ten command files and lists `npm-release.md`.
README and `.omp/AGENTS.md` both document `/npm-release` without making it part of the ordinary bead lifecycle.
